case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. JOSEPH BEATTY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-19-2011 CONTINUED TO FEB-06-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE DEC-19-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-19-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-06-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
